Event: Darkness Castle Siege Feb 2025
Event Date: 13/02/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A194
Eternal Crucible Artifact

Triggers: 4 sec

The unit removes all debuffs from the ally with the lowest health, reduces damage dealt to that unit by 50% for 5 sec, and restores 25% health to that unit. Also, the artifact owner removes all buffs from the enemy with the lowest health, increases damage dealt to that unit by 50% for 5 sec, and deals pure damage to that unit equal to 25% of their max health.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
